projectDescription: A native macOS app for creating dynamic wallpapers that change based on sun position, time of day, or system appearance (Light/Dark Mode).
keyFeatures: Solar dynamic wallpapers that adapt to sun position (altitude and azimuth) throughout the year
Time-based wallpapers that cycle through images according to a custom daily schedule
Appearance wallpapers that switch between light and dark images based on macOS system appearance
Built-in Solar Calculator to determine sun position using GPS coordinates, date, and time
Drag-and-drop image import with support for PNG, JPEG, TIFF, and HEIC formats
Exports wallpapers as native macOS HEIC files compatible with Dynamic Desktop
Available on Mac App Store and as a direct GitHub download
Localized in 9+ languages including English, French, Chinese, German, Korean, and Spanish
publicApiSurface: ImageAttributes(url: URL, index: Int, primary: Bool, imageType: ImageType, appearanceType: AppearanceType?)
WallpaperService.createWallpaper(_ attributes: [ImageAttributes], progressCallback: ProgressCallback?) throws -> Data
SolarService.altitude(latitude: Double, longitude: Double, date: Date, timezone: Int, dlstime: Int) throws -> Double
SolarService.azimuth(latitude: Double, longitude: Double, date: Date, timezone: Int, dlstime: Int) throws -> Double
WalkthroughType: solarWallpaper | timeWallpaper | appearanceWallpaper | solarCalculator | setWallpaper
